title: German-Style Broccoli and Scone Bake
description: A hearty German-inspired dish featuring broccoli, scones, and a creamy topping.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, steamed broccoli, and torn scones.
In a separate bowl, whisk together heavy cream and softened butter until smooth.
Add cream mixture to the dry ingredients and stir until combined.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and bake for 25-30 minutes.
Serve warm, garnished with additional clotted cream if desired.
